headline: Art for Passing Strangers
text: Growing up between Poland, Ireland, and Portugal. How have these different cultural landscapes shaped your visual language? BerriBlue: Growing up in different countries naturally shaped both me and my work. Each place had its own light, atmosphere, and way of looking at the world. All of that influenced me. Portugal brought colour and confidence into my visual language. The light there is bright and unapologetic.

headline: BerriBlue: cerámica urbana libre
text: Es posible que, de entre los más ávidos viajeros, alguien se haya topado por alguna ciudad europea con un mural cerámico de BerriBlue en una esquina y no lo sepa.

headline: BerriBlue - street art inspirowany snami
text: Na ulicach europejskich miast znajdziemy ponad sto prac stworzonych przez BerriBlue. Dla przechodniów to tylko street art. Dla artystki coś więcej. Kolorowe płytki ceramiczne, które tworzy, zdają się mówić - tu byłam, tu czułam się dobrze, jak w domu.

headline: Idę z kubełkiem zawiniętym w folię, kafle mam w plecaku, a wszystko wcześniej zaplanowane
text: Od dawna trafiam na twoje kaflowe prace wklejane w różnych miejscach w tkankę Warszawy - jeden piesek z ogromnym przyrodzeniem został zresztą przez kogoś niedawno skuty. Ostatnio duża mozaika znalazła się na mojej kamienicy.

headline: Street Art and Azulejo of BerriBlue
text: For the street, the imagery needs to be bold enough to carry its own weight… A gallery environment… allows breathing space, so the imagery has the room to be more delicate; it has nothing to fight against or withstand.

headline: A Vietri sul Mare l'esposizione internazionale “Canvas”: sette artisti internazionali, sette creazioni ceramiche, sette opere su tela
text: Dal 22 aprile al 7 maggio 2024 l'aula consiliare di Vietri sul Mare sarà la location dell'importante esposizione internazionale “Canvas”, con sette artisti internazionali, sette creazioni ceramiche, sette opere su tela.

headline: Berri Blue: Myths & Legends as Street Art
Invader w Polsce! Praca światowej sławy twórcy street artu po raz pierwszy w kraju
text: Pojawią się również prace innych, najwybitniejszych twórców działających w nurcie street artu, którzy już cieszą się ogromnym uznaniem za granicą. Marcowa 'Sztuka Ulicy' to prace wybitnych artystek. Wśród nich m.in. NeSpoon, Mona Tusz i polka mieszkająca w Portugalii, BerriBlue.

headline: Sztuka Ulica
text: BerriBlue jest malarką i artystką street artową, która obecnie mieszka w Porto w Portugalii. Artystka urodziła się w Polsce. W wieku 13 lat wyjechała do Dublina, gdzie ukończyła studia ze Sztuk Pięknych i Grafiki na National College of Art.

headline: Roteiro da arte urbana no Porto
Street Artist BerriBlue Ep. 202
text: Portugal-based street artist Berri Blue talks about dyslexia, the importance of socialization for mental health, and board games.

headline: Esta exposição traz o estúdio de Berri Blue para a galeria Urtiga
text: A artista polaca, radicada no Porto desde 2016, apresenta 'Amor em tempos de praga', exposição-instalação que aloja as suas memórias e vivências no pré e pós-confinamento. Para ver até 29 de Julho, com entrada livre.

headline: Berriblue nas ruas de Lisboa
text: A artista polaca Berri Blue foi viver para a Irlanda aos 13 anos e em 2016 mudou-se para o Porto, cidade que tem sido palco principal da sua obra. Ela não é bem uma artista de rua

headline: Flying The Flag: BerriBlue
text: Last June, fresh from a jaunt to Pitti Uomo, I came into contact with BerriBlue, a Polish-Irish artist of myriad disciplines.

headline: My Hometown: BerriBlue
text: BerriBlue is a 27 year old Polish-Irish painter and street artist based in Porto, whose many travels and nomadic upbringing has informed her artistic practice. We took five minutes to delve into how Poland, Ireland and Portugal have acted as main characters in both Berriblue's life and art.

headline: BerriBlue
text: BerriBlue is a young, female street artist. Originally from Poland, she now lives and works in Portugal. She works mainly through paste-ups, which she paints at home in her studio. Her work deals with themes such as mental health, femininity, sexuality, and mortality. She currently has pieces up in Porto, Lisbon, London, and Dublin.

headline: 3 Female Artists Who Are Rocking It Right Now
text: BerriBlue is a street artist based in Porto, Portugal, known for her beautifully painted paste-ups. Her work deals with her own mental health difficulties, sexuality, and mortality. Her imagery is sometimes very strong and visceral, and sometimes playful or wistful, but there's always an edge of strength and confidence to her pieces,

headline: A feminina trindade da ilustração portuguesa
text: Berriblue é uma artista meio polaca, meio irlandesa, que há dois anos trocou, com o marido, Dublin pelo Porto. Antes passaram quatro meses na aldeia da Benfeita, 'onde quase enlouque-

headline: Além paredes, Berri Blue vai ter primeira exposição a solo no Porto
text: Primeira exposição da artista polaca e irlandesa a viver no Porto inaugura-se a 1 de Junho, na loja Vintage Department, perto da Ribeira

headline: Já todos tropeçámos nas obras de Berri Blue — basta andar na rua
text: As ruas da Baixa do Porto são a galeria da artista polaca que se inspira no seu inconsciente para tratar com leveza temas como a identidade, a sexualidade, a saúde mental e a morte

headline: Królestwo street art'u, czyli alternatywny spacer po Porto
text: na ulicach Porto znajdziemy też nieco prac artystki o polsko-irlandzkich korzeniach. Swą przygodę ze street art’em zaczęła w Dublinie, gdzie znana jest pod pseudonimem JTB. Poza street art'em Berriblue projektuje i tworzy grafikę.

headline: This lovely Repeal the 8th street art has been spotted on a wall in Portugal
text: IT IS ALWAYS heartening to see encouragement from abroad for the Abortion Rights Campaign in Ireland. In the last couple of months there's been huge support from organizations and individuals abroad.

headline: Who is BerriBlue?
text: Não têm um ar simpático nem são fotogénicas mas estas caras andam a multiplicar-se a olhos vistos por algumas ruas da Baixa. É possível que se cruze com elas na Rua das Oliveiras ou em Miguel Bombarda.
